name: mirrortrace-breach-check
title: MirrorTrace AUX — Breach Exposure Check (k-anonymity)
description: Auxiliary actor. Checks whether the SELF subject's OWN candidate passwords appear in the Have I Been Pwned 'Pwned Passwords' corpus using k-anonymity (only a 5-char SHA-1 prefix ever leaves the machine; Add-Padding enabled), and emits privacy-preserving email-hash probes for cross-source correlation. Scope-gated to self/public_figure ONLY via shared/scope.js. Optionally performs an authenticated own-account breach lookup when HIBP_API_KEY is set and scope=self. Emits typed module-events (event_type/source_module/data/confidence) for the SpiderFoot-style correlation engine. NO fake data: a missing key means no account lookup, never a fabricated hit.
